Reasoning:
The current visit record primarily details trauma, cardiac complications (Atrial Fibrillation), and associated management (Morphine, Metoprolol, etc.). The presence of trauma and cardiac issues alone is insufficient to predict a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" based on the strict criteria provided.
